content_fingerprint: ollama v0 21 3 rc0 bridges openai reasoning effort to native think parameter ollama s latest release candidate introduces a compatibility layer mapping openai s reasoning effort parameter to ollama s native think setting ollama has tagged v0 21 3 rc0 as its newest pre release published on 24 april 2026 the standout change in this release is a pull request 15789 that maps openai s reasoning effort parameter onto ollama s own think configuration giving developers a direct compatibility shim when migrating or proxying openai api calls through ollama the change is oriented toward openai compatible
